name: MongoDB Replica Set Expansion
description: Expand MongoDB replica set by adding additional secondary nodes for improved read scalability

template.description: Expanding MongoDB replica set from {{currentReplicas}} to {{targetReplicas}} nodes. Each node currently holds {{dataSize}}GB of data. Applications use '{{readPreference}}' read preference. New secondaries will improve read distribution and provide additional redundancy.
template.currentState: MongoDB replica set with {{currentReplicas}} nodes (1 primary, {{currentReplicas - 1}} secondaries). {{dataSize}}GB data per node. Applications configured with '{{readPreference}}' read preference. Replication lag typically under 1 second.
template.proposedState: Expanded replica set with {{targetReplicas}} nodes (1 primary, {{targetReplicas - 1}} secondaries). New nodes will sync {{dataSize}}GB via initial sync. Same read preference maintained. Load balancing across {{targetReplicas - 1}} secondaries for reads.
template.trafficPatterns: High read volume with 90% reads, 10% writes. Peak traffic during business hours. Read operations include complex aggregations and full-text search. Write operations are transactional updates and inserts.
